MVP-55 controlled runtime battalion

100-Agent Runtime Battalion

Activate, deactivate, heartbeat, and monitor a controlled 100-agent supervised runtime battalion across 10 lanes. No command execution.

MVP-55 100-Agent Runtime Battalion Runtime battalion size: 100 Live runtime agents enabled: 0–100 Total registered agents: 47,979 Activation beyond 100: blocked Full 47,979 activation: blocked

Kill switch

Visible and ready

Mass activation remains blocked. The battalion can only operate inside the approved 100-agent boundary across 10 lanes.

Kill switch visible No activate all route

Loading backend state...

Backend Status Panel

Battalion readiness and runtime config

The battalion is controlled, supervised, audit-only, and capped at 100 agents across 10 lanes.

  • Backend functions respondLoading...
  • Runtime activation startedfalse
  • Runtime battalion size100
  • Live runtime agents enabled0 of 100
  • Max batch size100
  • Active lanes0 of 10
  • Inactive lanes10 of 10
  • Heartbeat count0
  • Readiness note count0
  • Total registered agents47,979
  • Kill switchvisible

Lane and Agent Control

Controlled lane scope and individual agent scope

Activation beyond 100 is blocked. Full 47,979 activation is blocked. Command, deploy, rollback, and alert execution remain disabled.

Current Selection

Selected lane and agent snapshot

No lane loaded yet.
intake_lane mvp55_battalion_agent_001 Select a lane to inspect its health. Select an agent to inspect its status.

Lane-scoped, supervised, audit-only, readiness-note only.

Backend functions or Supabase environment variables are not configured yet. The UI is ready, but persistence requires Supabase URL and service-role key configured in Netlify environment variables.

Lane Roster

Ten lanes with ten agents each

Each lane remains supervised, lane-scoped, and capped at ten approved agents.

Lane health, Heartbeat count, and Readiness note count are tracked for every lane.

Audit Timeline

Activation, lane changes, heartbeat, and readiness notes

No audit events have been recorded yet.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

The hundred-agent runtime battalion is supervised, audit-only, and capped at one hundred agents across ten lanes. It does not enable command execution, deploy execution, rollback execution, alert sending, or full-squad mass activation.

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not enable live automation, command execution, database writes, Supabase mutations, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or runtime activation.

Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
